headline: Is FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Now Attractive After Share Price Slides 57% In One Year
summary: Investors may be wondering whether FactSet Research Systems at around US$199.86 is starting to look like a bargain, or if the recent slide is a warning sign for value focused investors. The stock has had a tough run, with the share price down 10.8% over the past week, 10.6% over the past month, 29.8% year to date, and 56.8% over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on how this extended share price weakness has sharpened the debate around whether FactSet is now priced for lower...

headline: Chip Stocks Are Extended Amid AI Boom; One Hovers In Buy Zone
summary: Chip stocks have surged to new highs in the stock market, showing that the artificial intelligence trade continues to lure buyers after massive gains in 2025.  In the IBD 50, however, that means most chip stocks are extended.  Analysts polled by FactSet had targeted earnings of $1.29 a share on $9.9 billion in revenue.
